a water body that has greater
than its original habitat- (Pg. 222, E)

C) Salt concentrationD) Water clarity

16. The organism try to maintain the
constancy of its internal environment and
the process is called (Pg. 223, E)
A) Hibernation B) Aestivation
C) Homeostasis D) None of these

(A) + (B)

means- (Pg. 224, E)
A) Chemical B) Physiological

of- (Pg. 224, E)

changes according to the ambient
temperature is known as (Pg. 224, E)
